title: Western Union and Regions Bank Renew Agreement for Global Money Transfer and Payment Services
text: DENVER & BIRMINGHAM, Ala.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Western Union (NYSE: WU) and Regions Bank (NYSE: RF) announced a five-year extension to their original 2011 agreement allowing consumers to use Western Union® global money transfer and expedited bill pay services to send or receive money at any of Regions Bank's more than 1,250 U.S. locations.

title: After Great Performance, This Will Be Regions Financial's Next Challenge
text: Regions Financial has done an excellent job of transforming the bank since its struggles during the Great Recession.

title: Regions Financial Has Engineered a Remarkable Turnaround Since the Great Recession
text: The bank has greatly strengthened its balance sheet and just reported excellent quarterly results in a difficult environment.
